---
name: Security concern
about: Report a potential security concern (do not include exploit details)
labels: [security]
---

## Important
Do not post sensitive exploit details, secrets, credentials, or proof-of-concept code in a public issue.

Use this template only to request secure triage routing.

## Summary
Provide a high-level description of the concern.

## Affected Area
- File/path/component:
- Environment:

## Potential Impact
Describe suspected impact in high-level terms.

## Contact and Routing
- Reporter contact:
- Preferred secure channel:

## Next Step
A repository maintainer should move this report to the private vulnerability reporting channel defined in SECURITY.md.
